summary: Tested new CalendarView implementation with independent scheduled_date field. All 8 backend API tests and 10 frontend UI tests passed. Calendar now positions orders by scheduled_date (not cancel_date), drag & drop updates only scheduled_date without touching cancel_date, alert icon shows when scheduled_date > cancel_date, and unscheduled orders panel works correctly.
features_tested: Backend: Order 62970 has scheduled_date=2026-03-28, cancel_date=2026-03-14 (independent fields) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/orders/{id} with scheduled_date updates ONLY scheduled_date - PASS
Backend: cancel_date remains unchanged after multiple scheduled_date updates - PASS
Backend: Setting scheduled_date on unscheduled order works without affecting cancel_date - PASS
Backend: model_extra in PUT endpoint handles scheduled_date correctly - PASS
Backend: scheduled_date format is YYYY-MM-DD (compatible with date-fns) - PASS
Backend: Orders grouped by scheduled_date for calendar display - PASS
Backend: SCHEDULING board returns orders with both scheduled_date and cancel_date fields - PASS
Frontend: CalendarView component renders with data-testid='calendar-view' - PASS
Frontend: 'Fecha de Planificacion' indicator visible in toolbar - PASS
Frontend: '4 sin programar' badge shows count of unscheduled orders - PASS
Frontend: Semana/Mes (Week/Month) view toggle works - PASS
Frontend: Order 62970 card appears on calendar with AlertTriangle icon (scheduled > cancel) - PASS
Frontend: Order 808 card appears on its scheduled_date - PASS
Frontend: Column configuration panel opens with all field toggles - PASS
Frontend: Unscheduled orders panel expands showing draggable order items - PASS
Frontend: Drag & drop moves order to new scheduled_date - PASS
Frontend: Warning toast appears when order scheduled after cancel date - PASS
Frontend: Drag & drop does NOT modify cancel_date (API verified) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CalendarView.js lines 40-46: safeParseDate handles both YYYY-MM-DD and ISO datetime formats correctly
CalendarView.js lines 48-54: isScheduledPastCancel correctly compares scheduled_date vs cancel_date for alert display
CalendarView.js line 191: getCalendarDate returns order.scheduled_date for calendar positioning (not cancel_date)
CalendarView.js lines 223-244: handleDrop updates scheduled_date only via PUT API, shows warning toast when scheduled > cancel
CalendarView.js lines 284-288: 'Fecha de Planificacion' indicator clearly marks what date field calendar uses
CalendarView.js lines 349-373: Unscheduled orders panel shows orders without scheduled_date with cancel_date reference
orders.py lines 84-118: PUT endpoint handles model_extra for arbitrary fields like scheduled_date, preserves cancel_date
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing orders: 62970 (scheduled 03-28, cancel 03-14), 808 (scheduled 03-25, cancel 04-06), 814 (scheduled 03-15, cancel 04-07), plus 4 unscheduled orders.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified scheduled_date independence from cancel_date. Key test data: Order 62970 now has scheduled_date=2026-03-28 (changed from 03-21 via drag test), cancel_date=2026-03-14 (unchanged). Calendar positions orders by scheduled_date field. Alert icon shows when scheduled > cancel. 4 orders have no scheduled_date and appear in 'sin programar' panel. The 'Fecha de Planificacion' indicator in toolbar confirms calendar uses scheduled_date. localStorage key 'cal_visible_fields' persists column config.
